source_notes.aniimo: Official form crosswalk records with local asset coverage, reconciled to pet_research_content_data. Internal placeholder form keys are admitted only when the official catalog identifies a published form.
source_notes.ambers: Static overworld Amber nodes, map-discovered Lumen Markings, Sanctums that award Lumen Seeds, verified Boss Clear rewards, and verified Runaway Amber or Lumin Collection event rewards. Overworld nodes retain their canonical static IDs and generated location labels.
